emails.subject: Re: Meeting with Mary Cook
emails.body: Re: Meeting with Mary Cook I spoke to Stephanie and anytime between 9-11 am or after 3:30 pm would be fine for us. Just let us know. Esmeralda Gonzalez/ENRON@enronXgate 03/23/2001 04:36 PM

emails.subject: RE: Meeting with Mary Cook
emails.body: RE: Meeting with Mary Cook I have penciled you guys in for Tuesday, March 27, 2001 9:30 10:00 a.m. in Mary's office. Thanks.
